parts.prompt:
The funnel contains liquid that is draining from the bottom. At the instant when the height of the liquid is
h (cid:32) 3 inches, the radius of the surface of the liquid is decreasing at a rate of inch per second. At this
instant, what is the rate of change of the height of the liquid with respect to time?
